chunkscanner.command.start.config.hint: Config format: key=value ... (revisit=60 tasks=16 radius=1.0 wpName=Shop wpInit=$ wpGroup=shops)
chunkscanner.msg.not_in_world: Cannot start: not in a world.
chunkscanner.msg.unknown_analyzer: Unknown analyzer: %s. Use /cs task list to see available.
chunkscanner.msg.scan_exists: Scan id "%s" already exists. Use /cs task stop %s first.
chunkscanner.msg.scan_not_pausable: Scan "%s" is not in a pausable state.
chunkscanner.msg.config_restarted: Restarted %d scan session(s) with new config.
chunkscanner.msg.db_file_not_found: Database file for scan "%s" not found.
chunkscanner.msg.db_file_using: Unable to delete database "%s": The database file is being used by an active scan session "%s". Please terminate the scan first.
chunkscanner.status.title: ======== ChunkScanner Status ========
chunkscanner.list.title: ===== Registered Analyzers =====
chunkscanner.help.title: ======== ChunkScanner Help ========
chunkscanner.analyzer.sign.name: Sign Scanner
chunkscanner.analyzer.sign.desc: Scans all sign block entities in the chunk and records their text content.
chunkscanner.analyzer.qshop.name: QShop Scanner
chunkscanner.analyzer.qshop.desc: Scans QShop-format signs attached to containers (chests, barrels, etc.) and records owner, buy/sell mode, item, and price.
chunkscanner.dbview.raw.name: Raw Data
chunkscanner.dbview.raw.desc: Display all KV data in raw hexadecimal format. Works with all analyzers.
chunkscanner.dbview.sign.name: Sign View
chunkscanner.dbview.sign.desc: Parse sign data and display readable text content with coordinates. Only for Sign analyzer.
chunkscanner.dbview.qshop.name: QShop View
chunkscanner.dbview.qshop.desc: Parse QShop data and display structured table with owner, buy/sell mode, item, and price. Only for QShop analyzer.
chunkscanner.gui.title: ChunkScanner Tasks
chunkscanner.gui.no_scans: No active scans. Enter an ID and click Create to start.
chunkscanner.gui.database.title: ChunkScanner Database
chunkscanner.filter.qshop.title: QShop Filter
chunkscanner.confirm.stop.title: Stop Scan
chunkscanner.confirm.stop.message: Are you sure you want to stop scan "%s"?
chunkscanner.confirm.stop_all.title: Stop All Scans
chunkscanner.confirm.stop_all.message: Are you sure you want to stop all scans?
chunkscanner.confirm.delete_db.title: Delete Database
chunkscanner.confirm.delete_db.message: Are you sure you want to delete database "%s"? This cannot be undone.
chunkscanner.task_config.title: Task Configuration
chunkscanner.task_config.hint: Empty fields will use global default values
chunkscanner.tooltip.print_coords: Click to print coordinates to chat
chunkscanner.tooltip.session.total: Total scanned: %d  |  Total found: %d  |  Total errors: %d
chunkscanner.qshop.flag.recovered: R - Registry ID recovered via translation table
chunkscanner.qshop.flag.enhanced: E - Contains enhanced data (extracted from chat)
